article_title: Fire kills 10 members of same family in Peru, police say

tasks.prompt: What is the main event reported in the article?
options: A fire killed ten members of one family in Lima
A flood destroyed a factory in northern Peru
Police rescued ten people from a collapsed mine
A family opened a new mattress business
tasks.correct_answer: A fire killed ten members of one family in Lima
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הרעיון המרכזי הוא השריפה הקטלנית בבית המשפחה בלימה.

tasks.prompt: How many of the victims were children?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מציינת שחמישה מההרוגים היו ילדים.

tasks.prompt: What business activity was linked to the family?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: לפי הדיווח, המשפחה ייצרה מזרנים והחזיקה אופנועים חשמליים.

tasks.prompt: What possible cause are police investigating?
options: An electrical failure confirmed by engineers
Arson connected to threats or extortion
A gas explosion at a restaurant
tasks.correct_answer: Arson connected to threats or extortion
tasks.explanation_hebrew: המשטרה חוקרת חשד להצתה על רקע איומים ודרישות סחיטה.

tasks.prompt: Why may the mattress-making materials have made the fire more dangerous? Answer in 1–3 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Mattress materials can be highly flammable
Flames could spread rapidly through the property
This helps explain the scale of the casualties

tasks.prompt: How many people were reportedly inside the building, and how many escaped? Answer in 1–2 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Seventeen family members were in the building

tasks.prompt: In the article, what does “extortion” mean?
options: Selling goods at a lower price
tasks.explanation_hebrew: בהקשר הכתבה, extortion פירושו דרישת כסף באמצעות איומים.

tasks.prompt: Write a 50–80 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: A deadly house fire occurred in Lima
Ten members of one family, including five children, died
Seven people escaped and two were reportedly injured
Police are investigating possible arson and extortion threats

tasks.prompt: Write 1–3 sentences explaining which detail best shows how quickly the emergency developed.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Choose a concrete detail such as motorcycles being set alight or flames reaching flammable materials
Explain how that detail shows rapid spread

tasks.prompt: Write one question you would ask investigators and explain why the answer matters.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Ask a relevant question about the cause, threats, extortion, fire safety, or escape routes
Explain how the answer could clarify responsibility or prevent another tragedy
